word: G3386 - μήτιγε - mḗtige - may'-tig-eh - How much more

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: How much more
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: NA / Not Available
much less, much more, much rather
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G3385 and G1065; not at all then, that is, not to say (the rather still): - how much more.
